query:
SELECT 
  id, awayTeam, homeTeam,
  -- Book RL (VSiN scraper)
  awayRunLine, homeRunLine,
  awayRunLineOdds, homeRunLineOdds,
  -- Book spread dual-write
  awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread,
  awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds,
  -- Model RL (mlbModelRunner)
  awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds,
  -- Edge
  spreadDiff, spreadEdge
FROM games
WHERE (awayTeam = 'ATL' AND homeTeam = 'LAD' AND gameDate = '2026-05-10')
   OR (awayTeam = 'CHC' AND homeTeam = 'TEX' AND gameDate = '2026-05-10')
ORDER BY awayTeam;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute

  awayRunLineOdds, homeRunLineOdds,
  -- Book spread dual-write

  awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds,
  -- Model RL (mlbModelRunner)
  awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds,
  -- Edge
  spreadDiff, spreadEdge
FROM games
WHERE (awayTeam = 'ATL' AND homeTeam = 'LAD' AND gameDate = '2026-05-10')
   OR (awayTeam = 'CHC' AND homeTeam = 'TEX' AND gameDate = '2026-05-10')
ORDER BY awayTeam;
